signals.headline: Iran Ceasefire Confirmed, Sparking SOL Price Surge to $87 Amid Broader Crypto Relief Rally | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Iran Ceasefire Confirmed, Sparking SOL Price Surge to $87 Amid Broader Crypto Relief Rally | YES | MED**  
An Iran ceasefire has provided market relief, driving **Solana (SOL)** up ~7% from $78 to $87, with potential to reclaim $85-$93 if momentum holds; this follows Trump's statements impacting prices negatively earlier.[2]

signals.headline: No breaking US inflation news confirmed, announced, or resolved today (April 22, 2026) that would move prediction market
signals.raw:
No breaking US inflation news confirmed, announced, or resolved today (April 22, 2026) that would move prediction markets.**[1][2][4]

signals.raw:
Solana** hits record ~167M holders in April (up 12% since Oct 2025), ranking 4th among L1s, plus $34.9M inflows last week, signaling holder strength despite prior outflows.[2]  
No other confirmations, announcements, or resolutions today directly tied to **April**, **Ethereum up**, or prediction markets like Polymarket beyond these; ETF flows were early April and mixed.[4]
